title: City Revenue Performance Dashboard
problem_statement: Sales managers currently don't know which cities are underperforming until it's too late, leading to delayed responses and missed revenue opportunities.
objective: Monitor daily revenue by city to catch performance drops early, enabling proactive investigation and resource reallocation.
audience: Sales managers responsible for city-level performance monitoring and optimization.
action_items: Investigate underperforming cities immediately upon detection
Reallocate sales resources and marketing budgets to struggling cities
Identify and replicate successful strategies from high-performing cities
Set up alerts for significant revenue drops by city
